name: @settle/anchor-tests
description: Mocha tests for the settle-agent-card Anchor program. Runs against either anchor's spawned solana-test-validator or devnet (slower). See ../../docs/TESTING.md.

scripts.test: node -e "console.log('[skip] @settle/anchor-tests is gated behind a running validator. Run pnpm anchor:test from the repo root (spins up solana-test-validator + anchor deploy + mocha), or pnpm --filter @settle/anchor-tests test:mocha if a validator is already running and ANCHOR_PROVIDER_URL is set.')"
